ocr_findings.description: Furigana above M&A (エムアンドエー), TOB (ティオービー), MBO (エムビーオー) visible in image but absent in OCR. Low impact; term meaning unaffected.
OCR renders '&' for '&' in M&A (HTML entity encoding artifact). Cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 03-03 on 経営戦略に関する重要用語. All body paragraphs accurately transcribed. コトラーの競争戦略section with リーダー subsection fully present. The HTML entity '&' for '&' is a minor encoding artifact, not a semantic error.
